Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search for the Foster loan in the LOS using mortgage_los_search_loans with a query like "Foster" or "Fairview" (or similar) to find loan LN-2026-00622 for Angela Foster at 2694 Fairview Rd, Charlotte, NC 28277. Loan ID: los_loan_6507d3b85a25. Status: processing. Closing date: 2026-05-08. Rate: 6.861%. Assigned processor: los_staff_c6b42763fb1f (Elena). Rate lock date: 2026-02-25. Rate lock expiration: 2026-04-26. Realtor: Brian Foster (brian.foster@mac.com). Notes reference Todd Jennings as the referral source.
OE 2: Retrieve conditions for the Foster loan using mortgage_los_get_conditions (loan_id: "los_loan_6507d3b85a25") to discover 6 conditions from Caliber, all issued 2026-04-10: (1) Updated pay stub within 30 days of closing (prior_to_docs, outstanding), (2) 2 months bank statements showing reserves, all accounts (prior_to_docs, outstanding), (3) Letter of explanation for credit inquiry dated 03/2026 (prior_to_docs, outstanding), (4) Homeowners insurance binder naming Caliber Home Loans as mortgagee (prior_to_closing, outstanding), (5) Final VOE or verbal verification of employment within 10 days of closing (prior_to_closing, outstanding), (6) Appraisal at or above purchase price of $335,000 (prior_to_docs, cleared by Elena Marchetti on 2026-04-18). Summary: 5 outstanding, 1 cleared.
OE 3: Check the loan activity log using mortgage_los_get_activity_log (loan_id: "los_loan_6507d3b85a25") to find Grace Yamamoto's reassignment entry (action: lo_reassignment, 2026-04-18): "Todd Jennings departed firm. File reassigned for processing continuation. No replacement LO assigned yet. Outstanding lender conditions. Elena Marchetti to handle processor-side coordination."
OE 4: Check rate lock status using mortgage_los_get_rate_lock_status (loan_id: "los_loan_6507d3b85a25") to confirm the lock was set 2026-02-25 at 6.861%, expiring 2026-04-26. The lock has expired as of today (April 28, 2026).
OE 5: Search emails using search_emails with a query like "Foster" or "LN-2026-00622" or "Caliber" or "conditions" (or similar) to find the Caliber underwriting conditions email (email_foster_cond_001) from mark.grayson@caliberhomeloans.com to todd.jennings@keystonemortgage.com, CC elena.marchetti@keystonemortgage.com (April 10, 2026), listing 5 outstanding conditions, noting the appraisal is cleared, and warning that the rate lock expires 4/26.
OE 6: Search emails using search_emails with a query like "Foster" or "angela.foster" or "docs needed" (or similar) to find Todd's doc request to the borrower and her replies. Note: Todd's outbound email (email_foster_docs_001) is in the SENT folder, so the agent may need to search SENT explicitly. Discovers: (a) email_foster_docs_001 (SENT, April 12) where Todd asks Angela for pay stub, bank statements, credit inquiry letter, and mentions HOI via SouthPark Insurance contact Tanya; (b) email_foster_docs_002 (INBOX, April 14) where Angela replies saying she uploaded her pay stub to the portal, asks which bank accounts are needed, and is confused about the credit inquiry ("Could it be from when I was rate shopping back in February?"); (c) email_foster_docs_003 (INBOX, April 21) where Angela follows up saying she sent the pay stub over a week ago, uploaded Chase and Wells Fargo statements to the portal, has not heard from Todd, and her realtor says sellers are impatient.
OE 7: Search emails using search_emails with a query like "Brian Foster" or "Foster closing timeline" or "brian.foster@mac.com" (or similar) to find the realtor's email (email_foster_realtor_001, INBOX, April 16) from brian.foster@mac.com to todd.jennings@keystonemortgage.com, requesting a closing timeline update, noting the closing was penciled for early May, sellers asking daily, and threatening to walk if no confirmation.
OE 8: Search emails using search_emails with a query like "Todd Jennings" or "file reassignments" or "reassignment" (or similar) to find Grace's transition email (email_foster_transition_001, INBOX, April 18) from grace.yamamoto@keystonemortgage.com to Elena and others, announcing Todd's departure and specifically assigning LN-2026-00622 (Foster on Fairview) to Elena as processor with outstanding Caliber conditions and a short lock.
OE 9: Search emails using search_emails with a query like "Cannot reach" or "info@keystonemortgage.com" (or similar) to find Angela's escalation email (email_foster_escalation_001, INBOX, April 23) from angela.foster.622@gmail.com to info@keystonemortgage.com, stating she has been trying to reach Todd for almost two weeks, has documents needing review, closing in about two weeks, realtor says sellers may walk, and requesting callback at (704) 974-9167.
OE 10: Search emails using search_emails with a query like "HOI" or "SouthPark Insurance" or "Tanya" or "insurance binder" (or similar) to find the insurance quote email (email_foster_hoi_001, INBOX, April 15) from tanya.reeves@southparkinsurance.com to todd.jennings@keystonemortgage.com, offering an HOI quote for Angela Foster at 2694 Fairview Rd with dwelling coverage $335,000 and annual premium $1,840, ready to bind once Angela confirms and the mortgagee clause info is provided. This connects to outstanding condition los_cond_foster_004 (HOI binder).
OE 11: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages with a search_query like "Foster" or "LN-2026-00622" or "Todd" (or similar), or browse #loan-processing (C002) using conversations_history, to find Elena's reassignment post (ts: 1744992600.000000, C002, April 18): "Just got Grace's email on Todd's files. LN-2026-00622 is mine. Anyone know the status on the other Todd files?" with reply_count: 1.
OE 12: Retrieve the thread reply on Elena's Slack post using conversations_replies (channel_id: "C002", thread_ts: "1744992600.000000") to discover Sofia's reply (ts: 1744993200.000000, April 18): "I saw LN-2026-00622 come through on the lock report last week. Camille flagged it as expiring soon. Not sure if Todd requested an extension before he left."
OE 13: Search Slack or browse #loan-processing (C002) to find Elena's follow-up message (ts: 1745074800.000000, C002, April 19): "Pulled up Foster file. Caliber issued 5 conditions on 4/10 and only the appraisal is cleared. Borrower sent a pay stub and maybe some statements but nothing got logged. Lock expired 4/26."
OE 14: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages with a search_query like "LN-2026-00622" or "lock expired" (or similar), or browse #rate-watch (C005) using conversations_history, to find Camille Foster's message (ts: 1745164800.000000, C005, April 20, user keystone_081307e9502b): "LN-2026-00622 lock expired 4/26. No extension was requested. Rates moved up since original lock. If we need a re-lock it is going to cost the borrower unless Grace approves eating the difference."
OE 15: Search CRM engagements using crm_list_engagements (unfiltered or keyword browse) or crm_show_data to find 3 Foster-related engagements. Note: these engagements have empty contact_ids/company_ids, so filtering by contact ID will not return them; the agent must browse engagements broadly. Discovers: (a) crm_engagement_foster_transition (NOTE, April 18 15:00): Todd Jennings departed, file LN-2026-00622 reassigned, Elena to coordinate, outstanding Caliber conditions, rate lock expires 4/26, no new LO assigned; (b) crm_engagement_foster_call (CALL, April 22 10:30): Inbound from Angela Foster (704) 974-9167, cannot reach Todd, wants status on conditions and closing, routed to Elena; (c) crm_engagement_foster_realtor (CALL, April 24 09:15): Brian Foster (realtor) called about Angela Foster closing timeline, sellers threatening to invoke contract contingency if no confirmation by end of next week.
OE 16: Look up Angela Foster's contact information using contacts_search_contacts with a query like "Angela Foster" or "Foster" (or similar). Returns multiple "Foster" contacts including Angela Foster (borrower_foster_angela, angela.foster.622@gmail.com, (704) 974-9167) and Camille Foster (staff_081307e9502b, camille.foster@keystonemortgage.com, Lock Desk / Pricing Analyst). Agent must correctly disambiguate the borrower from the lock desk analyst.
OE 17: Look up Camille Foster's contact information using contacts_search_contacts with a query like "Camille" or "Camille Foster" (or similar) to confirm camille.foster@keystonemortgage.com, Lock Desk / Pricing Analyst at Keystone Mortgage Partners.
OE 18: Send an email using send_email (or reply_to_email) from elena.marchetti@keystonemortgage.com to angela.foster.622@gmail.com, letting Angela know Elena is now handling her file, listing the specific outstanding documents still needed (pay stub within 30 days of closing, 2 months bank statements all accounts, letter of explanation for credit inquiry dated 03/2026, homeowners insurance binder naming Caliber Home Loans as mortgagee, final VOE within 10 days of closing), and reassuring her that the file is being worked on and they are getting things back on track.
OE 19: Add an activity note to the Foster loan using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_6507d3b85a25", action: a relevant action string such as "note" or "processor_update" or similar, detail: documenting that Elena has picked up the file, current condition status with 5 outstanding conditions from Caliber and 1 cleared appraisal, and the rate lock situation including that it expired 4/26 with no extension requested and needs re-lock, author: "Elena Marchetti" or similar).
OE 20: Send a message to Camille Foster about the rate lock using send_email (or reply_to_email) from elena.marchetti@keystonemortgage.com to camille.foster@keystonemortgage.com, or using conversations_add_message to post in an appropriate Slack channel or DM. The message must reference the lock on LN-2026-00622, that it expired 4/26 without an extension request, and ask about re-lock pricing and options so Elena can give the borrower and realtor a straight answer on closing.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 28, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
universe_idmortgage-broker-01-keystone

About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

Agent must correctly disambiguate the borrower from the lock desk analyst.
OE 17: Look up Camille Foster's contact information using contacts_search_contacts with a query like "Camille" or "Camille Foster" (or similar) to confirm camille.foster@keystonemortgage.com, Lock Desk / Pricing Analyst at Keystone Mortgage Partners.
OE 18: Send an email using send_email (or reply_to_email) from elena.marchetti@keystonemortgage.com to angela.foster.622@gmail.com, letting Angela know Elena is now handling her file, listing the specific outstanding documents still needed (pay stub within 30 days of closing, 2 months bank statements all accounts, letter of explanation for credit inquiry dated 03/2026, homeowners insurance binder naming Caliber Home Loans as mortgagee, final VOE within 10 days of closing), and reassuring her that the file is being worked on and they are getting things back on track.
OE 19: Add an activity note to the Foster loan using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_6507d3b85a25", action: a relevant action string such as "note" or "processor_update" or similar, detail: documenting that Elena has picked up the file, current condition status with 5 outstanding conditions from Caliber and 1 cleared appraisal, and the rate lock situation including that it expired 4/26 with no extension requested and needs re-lock, author: "Elena Marchetti" or similar).
OE 20: Send a message to Camille Foster about the rate lock using send_email (or reply_to_email) from elena.marchetti@keystonemortgage.com to camille.foster@keystonemortgage.com, or using conversations_add_message to post in an appropriate Slack channel or DM. The message must reference the lock on LN-2026-00622, that it expired 4/26 without an extension request, and ask about re-lock pricing and options so Elena can give the borrower and realtor a straight answer on closing.
